title: Query workspace by Monday.com's API

posts.author: Juyeong (Lee Juyeong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m Juyeong from SPH.

I need to develop some web systems, so I checked Monday.com’s API document.

There is no way to query workspace, right?

Just get workspace’s ID when query boards.

Is there another way to query workspace names?

Best regards,

Juyeong.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Juyeong

At this time, you are correct. You will only be able to query a workspace’s info as part of the board in which it exists.

That said, it’s a great improvement point and I’m happy to pass that as a feature improvement to our product team. I will not be able to provide a rough ETA just yet, though.

-Alex
